description: Position-weighted heuristic baseline
Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct zero-shot, 55% format valid
RL 1 epoch, 4e-5 lr, rank32, 100% format valid, beats zero-shot but not heuristic on log_loss
Top-20 candidates, RL 1 epoch, brier beats heuristic (0.77 vs 0.81)
Blended brier+logloss reward, worse than exp2, reverted
0.5% probability floor on all candidates, beats heuristic on all metrics
Calibration guidance in prompt, RL retrained, new best on all metrics
Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct zero-shot, new best anchor log_loss and brier
Fixed target_label bug for out-of-top-N winners, floor=0.001, massive log_loss improvement
8B+RL retrained with bugfix, better than heuristic but 70B zero-shot still wins on anchor
Explicit historical base rates in prompt, slightly worse than exp7, reverted
Added 2023 season (274 total examples), 8B+RL improved but 70B still best on anchor
Added field analysis (margin, within-3/5 strokes), small anchor log_loss improvement
Enhanced system prompt, slightly worse, reverted
Top-10 candidates instead of 20, new best anchor log_loss
8B+RL with top-10, close to 70B but not better
Top-5 candidates, new best on all log_loss metrics! 42% better than heuristic
Top-3 candidates, massive improvement! 55% better than heuristic, 87% top3_recall
Top-1 (leader+other), best log_loss but binary prediction only, loses multi-candidate resolution
8B+RL with top-3, matches 70B on anchor, beats it on research! Best research log_loss
8B+RL with top-1, decent but 70B still better on binary prediction
DeepSeek-V3.1 top-3, new best multi-candidate anchor! 50% top1 on research
DeepSeek-V3.1 top-1, identical to 70B on binary
DeepSeek-V3.1 top-2, good balance of resolution and calibration, 55% top1
Qwen3-4B-Instruct top-3, 100% format valid with CoT, between 70B and 8B+RL
Round-dependent: R2=top3, R3=top1, good balance of resolution and metrics
Round-dependent: R2=top2, R3=top1, strong all-around
316 examples (2022-2026), 8B+RL anchor regressed, needs hyperparams tuning
Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct top-3, surprisingly beats larger 235B model
Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct top-3, 100% format, 47% research top1
Kimi-K2-Thinking top-3, good brier but higher log_loss, 97% format
8B+RL lr=1.5e-5, 316 examples, best 8B research (1.18), top3_recall=94.7%
GPT-OSS-120B base, 50% format valid, not useful zero-shot
Nemotron-Super-120B, 95% format valid but ll=1.91, not competitive
Nemotron-Nano-30B, 2.6% format valid, broken
SFT from DeepSeek->8B, NEW BEST multi-cand anchor! 50% top1, 95% top3
SFT+RL combo slightly worse than SFT-only, RL degraded SFT calibration
SFT distill top-1, matches DeepSeek binary (ll=0.59) in 8B model
SFT distill R2=top2/R3=top1, great balance: ll=0.83, 58% top1, multi-cand for R2
DeepSeek+70B multi-teacher SFT, marginally worse than single teacher
Added EUR Tour (532 total), SFT on 456 train examples, slightly better brier
SFT mixed R2=2/R3=1 on expanded EUR+PGA data, best balanced config
SFT top-1 on expanded data, new best binary (ll=0.585, brier=0.397)
3-temp augmented SFT (1368 examples), no improvement over base SFT
LoRA rank 64, nearly identical to rank 32, rank not a bottleneck
DeepSeek R2=top2/R3=top1, best zero-shot balanced (ll=0.81, 58% top1)
SFT mixed 5 epochs, slight improvement over 3ep (0.826->0.818), close to DeepSeek 0.808
Added R1 snapshots (728 total, 614 train), similar anchor, research eval expanded to 57 examples
70B SFT same quality as 8B SFT — confirms student capacity is not the bottleneck
R1=3/R2=2/R3=1 SFT, R1 data dilutes R2/R3 anchor quality (0.95 vs 0.83)
Qwen3.5-4B base + SFT, 0% format valid (base model incompatible)
Kimi-K2-Thinking top-1, 53% format valid, thinking model can't follow constraints
PGA+EUR+LPGA 735 train, best research ll=1.16, 54% top1, anchor slightly regressed
PGA-only SFT 5 epochs (474 PGA examples), anchor improving toward 1.23
Qwen3-32B SFT, same quality as 8B SFT — again confirms teacher is bottleneck
Averaged DeepSeek+70B labels, no improvement — teachers agree, averaging redundant
Hole-by-hole scorecard in prompt (all rounds); helps research but anchor slightly worse
R3-only scorecard; scorecard alone hurts R2 predictions, no net anchor improvement
R3 scorecard + pressure profiles; strong research improvement but scorecard adds noise
Pressure profiles only (no scorecard); NEW BEST anchor for DeepSeek! ll=1.22 vs prior 1.24
Enhanced pressure profiles (within-3-strokes context), slightly worse than simple profiles
8B SFT distill from DeepSeek with pressure profiles; 100% format, 51% top1, 87% top3
Mixed SFT R2=top2/R3=top1 with pressure; anchored avg ll=0.83, matches exp36
7 epochs pressure SFT, anchor worse than 5ep, research better — overfitting
Explicit empirical base rates (1st=25/36%, 2nd=14/15%) in hints, over-spread
7ep SFT w/pressure-trained labels but eval w/o pressure — all runs post-exp30 worse
SFT no-pressure all 735 examples; research BEST (1.135), anchor still 1.28
PGA R2+R3 only 316 examples, less data hurts anchor (1.31)
PGA all rounds 474 examples; anchor 1.29, research 1.14 — more data needs all rounds
Tournament past-winners in prompt; research -0.025 improvement, anchor within noise (±0.14)
Per-player course history (R3 pos, past years) + pressure; anchor avg=1.226 (noisy); research avg=1.135 (single 1.112 was lucky run)
8B SFT with tournament history prompts; anchor 1.30 worse, research 1.15 — 8B can't use history context well
Pressure+tournament+player history; too many features hurts anchor (1.25), research similar to tournament-only
8B SFT distill from DeepSeek(player_history+pressure); research avg=1.127 (2 runs: 1.106+1.148), anchor 1.237
3-config prompt ensemble; averaging suboptimal configs hurts (1.25 vs 1.22 best)
DeepSeek with explicit margin-based empirical win rates in prompt; anchor~1.22, research 1.164 (good), 47% top1
RL on SFT(exp66) checkpoint; anchor hurts (1.26 vs 1.24), confirms SFT+RL degrades calibration (see exp31)
Self-consistency 3-sample T=0.3 SFT (plain format, 735 examples); anchor avg 1.231 (2 runs: 1.201+1.261), research 1.124 vs exp61's 1.135
DeepSeek + pressure + player_history + player_quality; anchor avg=1.219 (3 runs), research avg=1.141 (3 runs); NEW BEST research (beats exp65 1.112 which was lucky)
RL on selfconsistency SFT; anchor catastrophically degraded (1.30!), confirms RL should not be used
Pressure + tournament_history combo; features ANTAGONISTIC, both anchor and research hurt significantly
3-sample SC SFT (player_history only); worse than greedy exp66 — self-consistency at T=0.3 hurts calibration
5-sample SC SFT (player_history only); same as 3-sample, SC averaging adds calibration noise
Greedy T=0 player history SFT replication; anchor avg=1.222 (2 runs: 1.218+1.226), research=1.131; NEW BEST 8B anchor (matches DeepSeek 1.22!)

8B SFT distill from DeepSeek(player_history+quality); anchor avg=1.233 (2 runs: 1.231+1.235), research avg=1.130 (2 runs: 1.129+1.130); research minimal improvement over exp74, anchor regressed slightly
DeepSeek quality-only (no pressure/history); anchor avg=1.223 (3 runs: 1.213+1.239+1.218), research avg=1.120 (2 runs: 1.110+1.130); research NEW BEST zero-shot!
DeepSeek quality+pressure (no history); anchor avg=1.206 (4 runs: 1.206+1.211+1.203+1.202), research avg=1.109 (3 runs: 1.114+1.114+1.100); NEW BEST BOTH METRICS! Features complement each other
Plain SFT 7 epochs; anchor 1.237, research 1.152 — overfitting vs 5ep (1.229 avg)
Quality-only teacher → plain student SFT; anchor avg=1.240 (2 runs: 1.242+1.238), research=1.148; no improvement over plain SFT

8B SFT distill DeepSeek(quality+pressure) into 8B (same features at eval); anchor avg=1.223 (5 runs: 1.224+1.219+1.220+1.229+1.224), research avg=1.121 (3 runs: 1.122+1.122+1.120); NEW BEST 8B research, anchor matches exp78

Q+P teacher → plain student SFT; anchor avg=1.221 (3 runs: 1.219+1.225+1.219), research avg=1.128 (2 runs: 1.126+1.131); Q+P labels improve student even without features at inference; anchor NEW BEST 8B

Exp77 model + player history at inference (train:quality+pressure, eval:quality+pressure+history); anchor avg=1.208 (3 runs: 1.209+1.207+1.208), research avg=1.122 (2 runs: 1.125+1.119); NEW BEST 8B anchor! Q+P SFT generalizes to use unseen history feature at eval

DeepSeek with ALL features (quality+pressure+history); anchor avg=1.190 (3 runs: 1.185+1.187+1.197), research avg=1.114 (3 runs: 1.102+1.128+1.112); NEW BEST anchor! All 3 features complement each other
8B SFT with all features (Q+P+history in training AND eval); anchor avg=1.224 (2 runs: 1.226+1.221), research=1.122; WORSE than exp79 (1.208) — training with history hurts vs eval-only history
Q+P teacher → quality-only student SFT (5ep); anchor avg=1.211 (3 runs: 1.202+1.215+1.216), research avg=1.126 (2 runs: 1.126+1.125); modest improvement over exp78 plain student

NEW R2 calibration hint (47% outsider wins, 20-30% leader win rate); anchor avg=1.180 (2 runs: 1.180+1.180) [57-ex]; research avg=1.101 (38-ex runs); MASSIVE JUMP FROM 1.206! R2 calibration was the key bottleneck
NEW R2 calibration hint on exp77 Q+P SFT model; anchor avg=1.197 (2 runs: 1.197+1.197) [57-ex]; MASSIVE 8B improvement from 1.223

Few-shot R3 calibration (2 historical same-margin examples) + Q+P; anchor avg=1.192 (4 runs: 1.192+1.187+1.196+1.189); research avg=1.109; improves R3 calibration but redundant with new R2 hint (1.180)
DeepSeek all-features+NEW R2 hint on 38-example anchor (R2+R3 only); anchor avg=1.167 (2 runs: 1.168+1.166), research avg=1.101 (2 runs: 1.101+1.102); NEW BEST on both evals
Exp77 8B model with NEW R2 hint on 38-example anchor; anchor avg=1.172 (2 runs deterministic), research avg=1.106; 8B matches DeepSeek!
8B re-distilled with new R2 calibration in training; anchor=1.172, research=1.106; identical to prompt-only exp81 — confirms prompt fix sufficient, retraining adds no value
Exp82 on 57-ex anchor (R1+R2+R3): anchor=1.184, research=1.099; better than exp81-r2calib-8b-57ex (1.197) — baking R2 hint into training helps R1 round too
R1 hint updated to 13%/64% (more aggressive 'other') — WORSE than original 15-20% hint for research

8B Q+P+history SFT with R3 calibration; 57-ex anchor=1.181, research=1.117; anchor R3 best (1.149) but anchor R1 worst (1.238); research worse than exp82 — history feature helps R3 large-margin games but hurts competitive R3 games

DeepSeek Q+P mc=5 (5 named candidates); anchor=1.492 — MASSIVE DEGRADATION from mc=3 (1.180); calibration hints tuned for mc=3 "other"≈40-50% but mc=5 needs "other"≈26%; prompt-calibration mismatch causes failure
DeepSeek Q+P mc=10; anchor=1.834 — even worse; confirms mc=3 is optimal with current calibration hints

Analytical ensemble: DeepSeek for R1, Exp84 for R2+R3; anchor=1.169 — NEW BEST anchor! R1 DeepSeek(1.203), R2 Exp84(1.155), R3 Exp84(1.149); research routing hurts (1.117 vs 1.101 DeepSeek); round-specific deployment needed
DeepSeek mc=5 with recalibrated "other" hints (27-30% R2); still 1.459 — naming players 4-5 explicitly (5-10%) is worse than "other" catch-all (40%); mc=3 optimal

Exp82 Q+P SFT + player_course_history at inference only; anchor=1.163 NEW BEST! R1=1.202, R2=1.148, R3=1.140; history helps ALL rounds; retraining not needed — plain student generalizes to rich inference
DeepSeek Q+P+player_history zero-shot; anchor=1.184 WORSE than Q+P=1.180; research=1.116 WORSE than 1.101; zero-shot model cannot leverage history effectively — SFT teaches proper history utilization
Exp82 with player_history+tournament_history; anchor=1.185 WORSE than player_history-only (1.163); tournament_history adds noise; optimal = Q+P+player_history

Exp87 (trained WITH Q+P+history) + history at inference; anchor=1.186 WORSE than exp82+hist (1.163); training with DeepSeek history labels hurts — DeepSeek doesn't use history well so its labels teach model to ignore history

Exp87 (trained WITH Q+P+history) without history at inference; anchor=1.182 slightly better than exp82-no-hist (1.184) but far worse than exp82+hist (1.163); baking history into training provides no benefit

Self-distillation: exp82+history as teacher, Q+P+history student; anchor=1.172 WORSE than exp82+hist (1.163); research=1.104 marginally better; exp82 implicit generalization to history is better than exp89 explicit training — in-context reasoning > memorized patterns
Exp89 without history at inference; anchor=1.177; history bonus tiny (+0.004) vs exp82's history bonus (+0.021) — confirms training WITH history reduces in-context learning ability
CoT-derived Q+P SFT; DeepSeek with CoT reasoning before JSON, probabilities extracted as labels; anchor=1.194 WITHOUT history, WORSE than exp82 (1.184); CoT labels don't transfer to better 8B student
Exp90 WITH history at inference; anchor=1.199, history HURTS (+0.005 worse); CoT labels break the implicit generalization mechanism — 8B can't use history with CoT-trained weights

Exp82 weights + FULL Stableford eval fix (correct sort + Stableford note + Pos=1,2,3); anchor=1.147 NEW BEST 8B! 8B generalizes to correct Stableford format without retraining; R1=1.206,R2=1.148,R3=1.089; research on 57-ex val=1.107

Retrained with partially-correct Stableford data (correct sort + note, but Pos=66/65 not 1/2); anchor=1.179 WORSE than exp91; contradictory training data (note says pos-1=leader but table shows pos=66) hurt the model

Retrained with FULLY correct Stableford data (sort + note + Pos=1,2,3); anchor=1.149 marginally worse than exp91+posfix (1.147); training on 9 correct Barracuda examples adds negligible value; eval-time prompt quality drives performance
DeepSeek Q+P + Stableford fix; anchor=1.167 (vs prior 1.180 = 0.013 improvement); 8B exp91+posfix still beats DeepSeek anchor (1.147 vs 1.167); research=1.123 on 57-ex val

Exp82/exp91 weights + scorecard (hole-by-hole scoring) at inference only; anchor=1.143 NEW BEST 8B! Scorecard adds momentum context for R3 predictions; research=1.106; max_candidates=3 + pressure + quality + history + scorecard

RL fine-tuning from exp91 (1 epoch, brier reward, Q+P+history+scorecard features, mc=3); anchor=1.176 WORSE; research=1.013 BEST EVER; RL overfits to training distribution: val.jsonl has 0 tournament_id overlap with train; RL adds too much variance
